---
title: "BINOMIAL"
generated: true
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BINOMIAL -->
```python
BINOMIAL = Family(name='binomial', has_fixed_dispersion=True, link=_logit, linkinv=_expit, mu_eta=_binomial_mu_eta, variance=(lambda mu: mu * (1.0 - mu)), unit_deviance=_binomial_deviance, init_mu=(lambda y: (y + 0.5) / 2.0), loglik=_binomial_loglik)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:BINOMIAL -->
*TODO: describe this type alias / constant.*
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
